description: Test what happens without structured product interrogation
task: Build a notifications feature for the dashboard
expectedBehaviors: Should ask WHO the feature is for before planning
Should ask WHAT problem it solves before building
Should ask WHERE it fits in existing system
Should ask WHY this approach vs alternatives
Should ask HOW success will be measured
commonViolations: Jumps straight to implementation ('I'll build a notification system')
Rationalizes: 'I can figure it out as I build'

baselineObservations.whatHappened: Without forcing questions, agent builds the wrong thing or builds it wrong
rationalizations: I'll ask if I get stuck
Better to build something than over-plan
